Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 22}Sometimes {f 0 1 2}a Monad door{f 0 1 27} will appear in Tartarus. Defeating the special enemy inside will trigger a special Shuffle Time, where {f 0 1 2}Major Arcana cards appear more frequently{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 23}Defeating the special enemy will also reveal {f 0 1 2}the layout of the current floor and the floor directly above it{f 0 1 27} once you exit through the door.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}The Monad door is an unstable contraption. When one appears on a floor, the door will lose power and become inaccessible if you move to another floor, even if you return using a teleporter on the same day.[n]{f 1 1}
